title: GPT 5.6 banned, Fable banned… it’s actually over.
summary: David Ondrej reports that GPT 5.6 and Fable AI have been banned. The video frames this development as a significant turning point in the AI landscape with the phrase "it's actually over".
writeup: David Ondrej argues that GPT 5.6 and a model called Fable have been banned, framing the development as the end of a particular phase in AI. The commentary centers on what he presents as significant regulatory or market actions against major AI models. The summary supports two specific claims: that both models are banned, and that Ondrej considers the situation settled. It touches on LLMs, model evaluation, and product-market fit without detailing the rationale behind either ban.
